input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OGNL has optional initialization-sensitive system-property paths such as `ognl.security.manager`, `ognl.UseJDK9PlusAccessHandler`, `ognl.UseStricterInvocation`, and `ognl.UseFirstMatchGetSetLookup`; tests that intentionally cover those paths should isolate class loading and restore properties.
SecurityManager-related coverage is fragile on newer JDKs, including JDK 25, so failing Java-run verification is more likely to require test adaptation than external setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process expression/reflection library; the 3.3.5 artifact declares its required Javassist runtime dependency transitively, and normal meaningful coverage is reachable with plain POJO expression parsing/evaluation tests.
